title: Chrome Sodium
description:
Make your minecraft fast!
and smooth
body:
#  **Chrome Sodium** 

## **1.21.5 UPDATE**
Hello! We're finally back in business!
Now with 1.21.5!
Enjoy a new and improved Chrome Sodium!

Chrome Sodium is a new way to expierence minecraft it lightweight and extremly fast! it has zoom features, some preinstalled shaders, and more!

## Chrome Sodium Better Together
Chrome Sodium Better Toether is a version of Chrome Sodium with multiplayer capabilites without servers, because together, it's better.

_powered by Essential Mod_

# Why Chrome Sodium?

## Customizable 🔧
You can easily modify the parts of this modpack, or swap em out! if something doesn't work, contact me! and i'll look into it when i have time.

## Reshareable 🕶️
You can make a whole other modpack based on this one! as long that it's alined to [Modrinth's Rules](https://modrinth.com/legal/rules)

## Lightweight 🪶
The mods here are mostly lightweight and don't take too much performance

i hope you like it :)

List of mods:
<details>
<summary>Mods</summary>

- Sodium
- Nvidium
- ETF
- EMF
- Capes
- ModernFix
- Lithium
- Indium
- Visuality
- ImmediatelyFast
- WTHIT (Disabled by default)
- Controlify
- Render Pearl (Disabled, and set to be removed next update)
- Better Third Person
- OptiGUI
- Sodium Extra
- Enhanced Block Entities
- Model Gap Fix
- Clumps
- Chat Heads
- Debugify
- Low on Fire
- Remove Loading Screen
- Chunky
- Packet Fixer
- Bad Optimizations
- No Telemetry
- No chat reports (Does not work on realms)
- JEI (Just Enough Items)
- Distant Horizons (Disabled by default)
- Language Reload
- FerriteCore
- Zoomify
- VERY MANY PLAYERS
- Auth Me
- 3D Skin Layers
- Mod Menu
- Better Statistics Screen
- C²M (Concurrent Chunk Management System)
- Blur
- Dynamic FPS
- Chunks Fade In
- Enchant Icons
- Xaero's Worldmap and Minimap
- Puzzle
- More Chat History
- BetterF3
- Continuity
- Fabric Skyboxes
- Packet Fixer
- Dynamic Crosshair
- Iris Shaders
- Let Me Despawn
- Status Effect Bars
</details>

API's:

<details>
<summary>API's</summary>
- YetAnotherConfigLib
- TCDCommons API
- Fabric Language Kotlin
- Distant Horizons API
- Cloth Config API
- Fabric API
</details>

Resource Packs:
<details>
<summary>Resource Packs</summary>
- Dark Loading Screen
- Fire Rekindled
- Icons
- Chat Reporting Helper
- Fast Better Grass
- Eating Animation
- 3D Ladders
- Translations for Sodium (English by default)
- Continuity Resources
</details>
